name: Yuletide Chocolate Dessert
recipeInstructions:
Source: BETTER HOMES & GARDENS, DECEMBER, 1956
1. Mix together crumbs and melted butter; reserve 2 tablespoons for top.
2. Press the remainder in the bottom of a 1-quart refrigerator tray.
3. Cream together 1/2 cup butter and confectioners' sugar.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each.
5. Spread over crumbs.
6. Combine sugar, cocoa, and cream; whip.
7. Fold in nuts and fruits.
8. Pile atop the mixture in the pan.
9. Sprinkle reserved crumbs over.
10. Chill for 24 hours or freeze.
11. Cut into wedges. Makes 9 to 12 servings.
